title: sideritis granatensis subsp. briquetiana
intro: Sideritis granatensis subsp. briquetiana, also known as Briquet's Ironwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to exhibit health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Sideritis granatensis subsp. briquetiana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to create capsules and ointments.
